Intelligence Narrative — Kill Condition Deep Dive
⚡ KC_01 ICBM / Nuclear (0.42 WATCH — SINGLE TRIGGER ARMED)

Hwasong-18 solid-fuel ICBM launched April 2026 — single trigger fired, DKRI zone elevated to CRITICAL during event. Reentry vehicle (RV) test not confirmed. DKRI returned to WATCH after UNSC emergency session and China diplomatic back-channel signal to Pyongyang.

  • Next trigger threshold: Confirmed RV reentry success OR nuclear detonation = DKRI immediately CRITICAL
  • Hwasong-18: Solid-fuel ICBM with estimated range 15,000 km+ — continental US reach confirmed by analysts
  • UNSC response: China and Russia blocked punitive resolution Feb 2026; US pushing for bilateral pressure channels
KC_02 Military Posture (0.38 WATCH): USS Ronald Reagan CSG deployed to Sea of Japan post-April launch. Combined US-ROK Freedom Shield exercise Q1 2026 at elevated tempo. B-52 strategic bomber sorties +40% vs 2025 baseline. USFK at heightened readiness posture. ROK F-35 alert cycle shortened.
KC_03 China Lifeline (0.35 WATCH): China-DPRK bilateral trade recovering sharply — $1.5B 2026 YTD vs $0.1B 2021 peak-isolation. China vetoed UNSC resolution Feb 2026. Xi-Kim back-channel signalling active. Direction: LOOSENING = higher DKRI pressure. China sanctions relief = DPRK operational capability restored faster.
KC_04 Regime Stability (0.20 NORMAL): Kim Jong Un public appearances regular — no signs of health issues or abnormal behaviour. No succession signals detected. Sister Kim Yo Jong retains senior position; continuity stable. No significant elite purges reported H1 2026.
KC_05 Cyber / Lazarus (0.28 WATCH): Lazarus Group USD 500M crypto theft Jan-Jun 2026. ByBit exchange attack confirmed DPRK attribution by US Cyber Command and South Korea NIS. Estimated 40% of WMD external funding sourced from Lazarus operations. Crypto-to-arms pipeline: USDT → OTC brokers → dual-use tech procurement.
